home.title: Generate, batch, and export production-ready barcodes.
home.description: Barcode Studio keeps every workflow in the browser: single labels, bulk barcode sets, XLSX writeback, and DOCX output without sending your files anywhere.
home.spotlightDescription: One workspace for quick previews, print-ready output, and private local file processing.

spotlightPoints.generator: Single barcode design with SVG and PNG export
spotlightPoints.set: Bulk editing with quick navigation and print layout
spotlightPoints.xlsx: Spreadsheet preview with barcode insertion into cells
spotlightPoints.docx: DOCX processing that turns text into rendered codes

slogans.title: Why teams adopt it
items: One fast screen for every barcode scenario.
Built for print quality, not just on-screen previews.
Private by design because files stay in the browser.
Ready for operators who need throughput, clarity, and control.

video.title: Video slot
video.description: Reserved space for your YouTube walkthrough or product demo.

footer.title: Move straight from landing to action
footer.description: Choose the workflow that fits your task and keep barcode, spreadsheet, and document operations inside one consistent workspace.

featureCards.title: Core workflows
featureCards.generatorBody: Tune barcode type, dimensions, colors, and export format in one panel.
featureCards.setBody: Manage larger batches with persistent cards and print-ready layouts.
featureCards.xlsxBody: Preview spreadsheets, map source columns, and write barcode images back.
featureCards.docxBody: Read text from Word files and generate new documents with barcodes.

validation.code39Invalid: Code 39 supports only digits, uppercase letters and characters: - . $ / + % and space.
validation.codabarInvalid: Codabar must start and end with A, B, C or D and contain digits or characters: - $ : / . +
validation.itfEven: ITF requires an even number of digits.
validation.pharmacodeRange: Pharmacode must be a number from 3 to 131070.
validation.generationFailed: Could not generate barcode for the given data.

help.title: Help Center & Documentation
help.description: Complete guide to Barcode Studio features. Learn how to optimally prepare files and generate codes.

generator.title: Single Generator
generator.body: A tool for creating precise codes. You can download them as SVG (vector) or PNG (raster). SVG is recommended for professional printing as it doesn't lose quality when scaled.

workflow.title: Step-by-step instruction:
workflow.step1: 1. Upload a .xlsx file in the XLSX section.
workflow.step2: 2. Click the column that contains the data (e.g., EAN numbers).
workflow.step3: 3. Click an empty column where the codes should appear.
workflow.step4: 4. Click 'Generate' – the app will insert barcode images directly into the cells.

workflow.title: Working with a DOCX document:
workflow.step1: 1. Choose the barcode type, then upload a .docx file with text values to encode.
workflow.step2: 2. Adjust the barcode appearance: height, bar width, scale, margins, colors, and text visibility.
workflow.step3: 3. Check the preview, print it, or click 'Generate' to download a new DOCX file with barcodes.

barcodeSet.title: Managing Barcode Sets (Bulk)
barcodeSet.body: A tool for bulk barcode management. You can add, remove, and edit multiple widgets simultaneously.

features.title: Key features:
features.nav: Navigation: Use the dot menu on the right to quickly jump between barcode groups (every 5 items).
features.edit: Editing: Click the pencil icon to open the side settings panel for a specific barcode.
features.print: Print All: The printer button generates a print-ready A4 grid featuring all barcodes.
features.shortcut: Keyboard Shortcut: Ctrl+P automatically triggers the bulk print functionality.

printing.title: Printing Rules
printing.body:
For best quality:
1. In the browser print window, disable 'Headers and footers'.
2. Set 'Margins' to 'None' or 'Minimum' if the DOCX document has its own margins.
3. Scale should be 100% to maintain A4 dimensions.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.eanError: EAN-13/8 Error: These codes require digits only. The last check digit will be calculated automatically if you provide one less than required.
troubleshooting.invisibleCode: Code is invisible? Check if the code color is the same as the background.

standards.title: Standards and Requirements
standards.intro: Each barcode standard has specific requirements for the type and length of data.

CODE128.name: Code 128
CODE128.desc: The most universal standard. Supports all ASCII characters (letters, numbers, symbols). Ideal for logistics and internal labels.

EAN13.name: EAN-13 / EAN-8
EAN13.desc: Retail standard. Requires digits only. EAN-13 (12-13 digits), EAN-8 (7-8 digits). The last digit is a checksum.

QR.name: QR Code / Data Matrix
QR.desc: 2D codes. Can store huge amounts of data, including URLs and long texts. Highly damage-resistant.

CODE39.name: Code 39
CODE39.desc: Supports uppercase letters, digits, and a few special characters (- . $ / + % space). Frequently used in the automotive industry.

ITF.name: ITF (Interleaved 2 of 5)
ITF.desc: Digits only, must be an even number of them. A very dense numeric code.

CODE93.name: Code 93
CODE93.desc: Increased density compared to Code 39. Supports the full ASCII character set.

UPC.name: UPC-A / UPC-E
UPC.desc: US standards. UPC-A (11-12 digits), UPC-E (6-8 digits). Primarily used in retail in the USA and Canada.

CODABAR.name: Codabar
CODABAR.desc: Used in libraries and blood banks. Must start and end with the letters A, B, C, or D.

PHARMACODE.name: Pharmacode
PHARMACODE.desc: Specialized code for the pharmaceutical industry. Supports only integers from 3 to 131070.

DATAMATRIX.name: Data Matrix
DATAMATRIX.desc: A very small and dense 2D code. Common in the electronics and medical industries.

PDF417.name: PDF417
PDF417.desc: A linear 2D code used on identity documents and tickets. Can store large amounts of text.

AZTEC.name: Aztec Code
AZTEC.desc: A high-density 2D code resembling QR. Commonly used in railway and airline tickets.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, all processing happens locally in your browser. No files or data are sent to a server.
faq.q2: Why can't I upload a .xls file?
faq.a2: We only support the modern .xlsx format. Older .xls files must first be saved as .xlsx in Excel.

barcodeSet.title: Barcode Set
barcodeSet.description: Create and manage multiple barcodes in one workspace.
